name: Secondary Education
note: Grade of C (2.0) or better required in all courses. Completion of a major in one or more teaching fields with GPA of 2.7 or higher is required. Approved teaching fields include American Government, American History, Art, Biology, Business, Chemistry, Coaching, Economics, English/Language Arts, French, German, Health, Journalism, Math, Music, Physical Education, Physics, Psychology, Sociology, Spanish, Speech/Theater, and World History.

sections.label: Iowa Distribution Requirements
sections.description: At least one course in each of the four fields of mathematics, natural sciences, social sciences, and humanities (minimum 10.0 course credits total in Liberal Arts Requirements).

sections.label: Methods Course(s)
sections.description: One or more methods courses appropriate to the teaching field.

options.title: Methods of Teaching Secondary School Physical Education and Health
